preconditions: Logged in as an ops-manager role
Account has at least one Stripe account connected
goal: Ops manager can export a fiscal-month-aligned CSV in under 60 seconds

steps.label: Open Exports page
steps.action: Click the 'Exports' link in the left navigation
steps.expected_behavior: Exports page loads; 'New export' button is visible top-right
assertions: Button labeled 'New export' is visible and enabled
Existing exports table is rendered (even if empty)

steps.label: Open the new export modal
steps.expected_behavior: A modal opens with date-range pickers and a 'Fiscal month' toggle
assertions: Modal is visible with focus trapped inside it
'Fiscal month' toggle is present and defaults to off
'Generate' button is visible at the bottom of the modal

steps.label: Enable fiscal-month toggle
steps.action: Click the 'Fiscal month' toggle and select 'May 2026' from the dropdown
steps.expected_behavior: Toggle switches on; date-range pickers are replaced with a single month dropdown
assertions: Month dropdown shows the last 12 fiscal months
steps.notes: Edge case: the dropdown should respect the org's fiscal-year setting

steps.label: Generate the CSV
steps.expected_behavior: Spinner appears for <60s, then a download dialog opens with a CSV file
assertions: Browser download dialog opens with a .csv file
